channel.title: Music - Tag - Huka's Garden

item.title: 🎶 Chinese playlist
item.author: Author
item.description: 你是我唯一的执着 - 马健涛 9420 - 麦小兜 (Mạch Tiểu Đâu) Hold不住的爱 (Tình Yêu Không Thể Nắm Giữ) - 龙梅子 (Long Mai Tử)

item.title: 🎶 Epic, EDM playlist
item.author: Author
item.description: For Your Future | 陽山偉偉 - 送给未来的你 Impossible - Two Steps From Hell, Merethe Soltvedt Star Sky - Two Steps From Hell Victory - Two Steps From Hell Mountain Call - Thomas Bergersen

item.title: 🎶 Instrumental playlist
item.author: Author
item.description: 痴情冢 - 琵琶朱文婧 A Day Without Rain - Bandari A Time For Us - Various Artists A Wandering Girl Singer - Various Artists Adagio - Bandari Adagio In C Minor - Bandari Aeolian - Bandari Alice Has Blue Eyes - 陈小平 Allegia - Bandari Annie’s Wonderland - Bandari Aqua Blue - Bandari Autumn Journey - Eric Chiryoku Ballade Pour Adeline - Richard

item.title: 🎶 Japanese playlist
item.author: Author
item.description: 365日の紙飛行機 - コバソロ feat. Lefty Hand Cream 365日の紙飛行機 - 山本彩 365日の紙飛行機(Live) - 山本彩 3人の写真 - Kiroro 3月9日 - コバソロ feat. Lefty Hand Cream

item.title: 🎶 English playlist
item.author: Author
item.description: (Everything I Do) I Do It For You - Bryan Adams Tokyo Square 2 Become 1 - Spice Girls 25 Minutes - Michael Learns To Rock A Thousand Years - Christina Perri After The Afterparty - Charli Xcx ft. Lil Yachty All About Us - He Is We ft. Owl City All Falls Down - Alan Walker feat. Noah Cyrus with Digital Farm Animals All For One - Blackmore’s Night All Out Of Love - Air Supply All Rise - Blue Alone - Alan Walker Amazed - Lonestar Amazing - Matt Cardle Anyone Of Us (Stupid Mistake) - Gareth Gates Automatic - Miranda Lambert Baby I Love You - Tiffany Alvord Bad Day - Daniel Powter Beau In The Back - Brad Cox Beautiful In White - Shane Filan Beauty And A Beat - Alex Goot, Kurt Schneider, And Chrissy Costanza Because I Love You - Shakin’ Stevens Because Of You - Kelly Clarkson Because You Live - Jesse Mccartney Blue Ridge Mountain Song - Alan Jackson Bonfire Heart - James Blunt Boom, Boom, Boom, Boom!
